name: Phuong Huu Vu Tran
tagline: Computer Science Undergraduate · AI/ML & NLP Research
bio: I am a rising second-year Computer Science undergraduate at the Vietnamese–German University (VGU) (GPA 9.0/10), a programme taught in English in cooperation with German partner universities.

My research spans natural language processing, large language models & LLM agents, AI for software engineering, and data mining. I have first-author manuscripts under review at CORE A* venues (NeurIPS, ICSE, ICDM) and Q1 journals (JAIR, LRE), a peer-reviewed workshop publication, and a shared-task championship.
I am actively engaged across four research labs in Vietnam and abroad, and I enjoy building reliable, verifiable AI systems. Reach me at 10425032@student.vgu.edu.vn.
